card_name_verified: Hilton Honors American Express Surpass® Card

recurring_credits.name: Hilton Quarterly Statement Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $50/quarter on Hilton property purchases ($200/year total).
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: Up to $50 in statement credits each quarter for purchases made directly with a property in the Hilton portfolio... up to $200 in statement credits annually

_excluded: Diamond status after $40k spend (conditional, status not credit)
